title: More Infested Blocks
description:
V1.0.1-1.21-A Adds infested granite, diorite, andesite, and tuff with no special texture distinguishing them from normal blocks. Other texture versions available.

Dev on all my projects will be paused for the duration of the BDS boycott against Microsoft.
body:
With the advent of the infested potion effect making it easy to gain access to a lot of silverfish, there's now several debatably good reasons to want more blocks to be silverfish infestable, from mining out large areas non-destructively, to pranking friends, to using texture packs for texturing.

Different Versions of the mod will add different infested versions of the blocks (always listed in full) with various texture pack treatments.
